name: low-temp
description: L2 (research rank 2): greedy decoding. Set temperature 0.0 (vs the item-8 default) to harden the fragile Gemma-4 tool-call path and make pass/fail scoring deterministic. Greedy/near-greedy is the function-calling standard (BFCL temp=0.001). Forwarded to the openai-compatible provider via the model's options.
